programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Transforming a huge house into a home.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: Robert loves his family's mid-century cabin in the woods, but now that the family has grown, wife Jennifer is starting to feel claustrophobic and frustrated with the lack of space.

programme.desc: A gamer wants to move to a larger home with space for a gaming studio, but his wife is content in their current home.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat's schedule is thrown by German customs; Bryan Sr. and Peter harvest 200-foot trees.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat sets logs in the rain; a priest convinces Bryan Sr. and Peter to build a gazebo for free; André and Joel take a float plane to buy $500,000 worth of logs.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: André goes to Ontario to lead his first build in six years; Beat has to collaborate; Peter is determined to get a vacation out of Bryan Jr.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Bryan Sr. resurrects an ancient crane dubbed "Rust Bucket" to complete a remote fishing cabin; Beat struggles with two huge projects competing for time and square footage on the work yard.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Andre muscles in on Sam's build in Kansas; winter gales put a chill on Peter's project for a Russian client.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Joel hopes a contract for four cabins in Michigan will lead to an order for 16 more; Andre's kitchen renovation becomes more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: With new scenes, Lyndsay and Leslie turn closets into a bedroom and take their cousin's house from DIY-gone-wrong to polished and natural; in a totally new house, the twins take on an entry and living room reno using only wallpaper and styling.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: High school sweethearts turn to their friends Lyndsay and Leslie to help sell their old tri-level home in a neighborhood of new builds; the twins update the home with a warm, minimalist style; Lyndsay makes plans with her own sweetheart.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay are on a mission to convert a couple's sprawling home into a nest egg; seeing the potential for a big sale, they use all their tricks to give the massive rooms with wood features and dated mirrors a modern, luxurious overhaul.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: The twins tackle a double design with a brand-new renovation of a tangled '90s kitchen; Lyndsay and Leslie redo a cottage rental into a gorgeous starter home with a stylish retro feel for a military family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: While looking for an old friend, Leslie and Lyndsay meet fellow VW enthusiasts who struggle to sell a house they built 15 years ago; the twins update the home's builder-grade materials and add darker finishes for an elegant twist on farmhouse style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Three generations of women are eager to sell their over-customized and unfinished 1950s rambler before they find a new place near the ocean; Lyndsay and Leslie introduce the Zen-like qualities of cottagecore style to create a cozy home like no other.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: The twins take a dated kitchen and restore it with a craftsman-but-modern style; with never-before-seen footage, including a new room, a risky remote cabin gets a midcentury modern makeover to make a lumberjack blush.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A couple of the twins' longtime friends need help updating their mother's rambler for sale; while Leslie worries that the colorful and eclectic design plan will repel buyers, Lyndsay gets a second opinion from Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A couple want to sell their 1970s rambler and get started on their dream retirement, but their wood-paneled home with only one bathroom needs work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Shanelle is tired of feeling like a teenager. As a single mom living temporarily in her father's home, she and her son Elijah are feeling boxed in. Their footprint is limited to three bedrooms, including one for her home business, but they are all bursting at the seams with years of clutter, clothing and nail tech gear. Kortney and Kenny reimagine the life they could live, creating two beautiful bedrooms and a stunning nail salon that will get business booming.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer doles out a dining room challenge in an English Cottage vs. Modern Glam faceoff. From travertine to bold stripes, they race to create high-end spaces in just two days--each with a very different vision.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a home office, pitting Palm Springs retro against Palm Beach prep. The two design families flex their haggling and out-of-the-box design solutions to create the office 2.0.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Shanelle is tired of feeling like a teenager. As a single mom living temporarily in her father's home, she and her son Elijah are feeling boxed in. Their footprint is limited to three bedrooms, including one for her home business, but they are all bursting at the seams with years of clutter, clothing and nail tech gear. Kortney and Kenny reimagine the life they could live, creating two beautiful bedrooms and a stunning nail salon that will get business booming.

programme.desc: Real estate agents Nick and Zina have a large, dark master bedroom with strange features that they need to renovate.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: David and Wemi hate their home's galley-style kitchen.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Sarah and Jon need help renovating their home's odd kitchen.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Joel and Kera want to use their outdated basement for family gatherings.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Karen and Matt want an open concept so they can keep an eye on their young kids, but renovation quotes exceed their budget.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Andrew, a single guy, wants an open concept for entertaining.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Engineers Eric and Rebecca want to renovate their kitchen to make it an open concept with a beverage center.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Jamie and Marcus want to renovate their kitchen on a budget.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: A busy family has an unfinished kitchen.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Rob and Caitlin want to renovate their master suite and turn it into an oasis.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: A busy family of four has a dysfunctional kitchen, and want to open it up.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Raj and Riva love their home, but want to renovate their kitchen.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Two Teenagers and Two Parents Take on Lisbon, Portugal
programme.desc: A warm-hearted Nashville family takes a leap of faith with a company move to Lisbon, Portugal; they're moving two teenagers, two dogs and two careers to a bustling city, so the relocation might prove to be a bigger adventure than expected.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Recipe for Family Adventure in Tamarindo, Costa Rica
programme.desc: A couple looks to leave Canada to give their kids an international upbringing in Costa Rica. They bought a fully operational restaurant in touristy Tamarindo, and now they're searching for a home suitable for their children that's also close to town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Creating Christmas Memories in Mexico City
programme.desc: A creative Minnesota couple looks to relocate and build an art business in Mexico City; they want to tap into one half of the pair's Mexican heritage and explore the holidays against a brand-new backdrop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From Bangkok to Berlin, Hoping for Snow
programme.desc: After two years in Bangkok, a family heads to Berlin; they can't wait for the holidays, and maybe even snow; they're looking for a place near school and work, but with a competitive housing market, finding a practical location may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After 15 years in San Francisco, a Parisian man and his pregnant wife are returning to his native France; they want to find a spacious apartment as soon as possible, but with limited inventory in central Paris, they may have to consider the suburbs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Making Kaiserslautern Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: With Christmas just around the corner, empty nesters hope to find a comfortable home for holiday hosting in Kaiserslautern, Germany; they're wanting plenty of bedrooms, but with homes in high demand, they may need Santa's help to find a large place.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: There's No Place Like Saint-Emilion for the Holidays
programme.desc: A young family leaves Canada for the south of France just in time for Christmas; they're ready to trade small-town British Columbia for the wine region of Saint-Emilion, France, but they may have to choose between price and space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Christmas Clash in Orebro, Sweden
programme.desc: A family of five is excited to experience a white Christmas as they leave sunny Australia for snowy Orebro, Sweden; affording the space they need in the location they want could be out of their reach, so their holiday cheer may turn to conflict.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: We'll Be Home in Zurich for Christmas
programme.desc: A job opportunity enables a Texas family to take their love of Christmas to a whole new level in Zurich, Switzerland; they're on a one-week orientation to check out the city; they hope to find a place with Swiss charm to return to by Christmas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: All Things Family Friendly in Lisbon
programme.desc: A job opportunity inspires an Oregon family to change everything they know and relocate to Lisbon, Portugal; she wants to spend more to make the transition easier, but he's stuck on a final number, and finding common ground is proving difficult.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An international couple and their giant dog grapple with finding an affordable place in Paris; with high expectations, a low budget and an airtight rental market, finding a home that fits all three of them will be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: More Than Just a Party Town, Playa del Carmen
programme.desc: After spending her 20s partying hard, a woman looks to refocus on wellness in Playa del Carmen, Mexico. She's hoping to live in the touristic city center, but with her high standards and meager budget, she may be on the outside looking in.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Killer Waves in Puerto Escondido, Mexico
programme.desc: Remote work enables a young traveler to trade rainy London for Puerto Escondido, Mexico; she's looking for a place where she can absorb the culture, chill with her cat and catch some killer waves in one of the world's premiere surf destinations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Grandmother's Stories Come to Life in London
programme.desc: Inspired by her grandmother's romanticized stories, a young woman moves to London with her fiancÃ© in hopes of finding some of that magic for herself; she's looking for traditional English charm, but he prefers something that's more modern.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott and Bryan head out for their annual fishing showdown; teams dive into their kitchens and dining areas; unexpected storage challenges test their creativity and with the clock ticking, temperatures rise between teammates; unexpected obstacles force teams to make tough decisions, and mounting setbacks threaten to derail even the strongest plans; guest judge Debra Salmoni steps in to help determine who brought the heat in the kitchen.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From Texas to Perth with Kids, Cats and Kangaroos
programme.desc: A single mom from Texas meets her Aussie soul mate and they're ready to relocate to Australia; they're looking to buy their first home in his native Perth, and with kids and cats in tow, they may need a little help from his family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Visions of a Jungle in Uvita, Costa Rica
programme.desc: A Californian woman's dream of a jungle retreat leads her family to Uvita, Costa Rica; they're looking for a new home and to start a holistic healing business, but without any immediate income, the good vibes may end with the bottom dollar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big City Life in Mexico City
programme.desc: American newlyweds fall in love with Mexico City during a vacation and decide to relocate; he wants a view in a downtown high-rise, and she wants a neighborhood vibe that reminds her of home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Two If by Catamaran in Tamarindo, Costa Rica
programme.desc: With their kids grown, a couple looks to leave Vancouver and start a catamaran business in Tamarindo, Costa Rica; they're faced with beautiful options, so they'll have to duke it out between a beach life with a view or a tropical jungle paradise.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The restoration of crumbling ancient villages and hamlets in France, Spain, Italy and Portugal.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Sibling Spat in Hoi An, Vietnam
programme.desc: After years apart, a pair of Canadian siblings reunite for a new adventure together in Vietnam; they both think the beach town of Hoi An, Vietnam, is a good fit, but it quickly turns into sibling rivalry as they struggle to agree on anything else.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Seeking Swiss Charm That Won't Break the Bank in Zurich
programme.desc: An American family of five looks to relocate to Zurich for Mom's job; she's focused on minimizing her commute, and he wants iconic Swiss charm, but accommodating both priorities in one of the world's most expensive cities may be a challenge.
